display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NOT A SUBSCRIPTION CANDIDATE
design frequency levers instead - bundles, loyalty, cross-sell

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Current organic repeat rate
above 35% at 90 days?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RETENTION IS WORKING WITHOUT SUB
add subscription as an option - do not force it

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gross margin per unit above 50%
after fulfillment?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MARGIN TOO THIN
fix COGS before subsidizing subscription churn

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Can you offer meaningful value
beyond discount - exclusive, convenience, early access?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BUILD SUBSCRIPTION with value layer
discount is the floor not the ceiling

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DISCOUNT-ONLY SUBSCRIPTION
will attract churners - build value before launching at scale
